faqs.subheading: Find Answers to Questions about the Transitions Lenses

faqs.question: Are Transitions lenses recommended?
faqs.answer: Yes! Transitions lenses are recommended for anyone looking for the convenience of photochromic technology, offering seamless adaptation to changing light conditions.

faqs.question: What is photochromic?
faqs.answer: Photochromic lenses contain special molecules that react to UV light, causing the lenses to darken outdoors and return to clear when indoors.

faqs.question: How do Transitions work?
faqs.answer: Transitions lenses contain photochromic dyes that darken when exposed to ultraviolet (UV) rays from the sun, providing optimal vision and comfort.

faqs.question: Is there a warranty?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Transitions lenses come with a standard warranty that covers manufacturing defects and guarantees the photochromic performance.

faqs.question: Are they good for driving?
faqs.answer: Transitions lenses are great for everyday use, and certain ranges like Transitions XTRActive are specially designed to darken even behind the windshield of a car.

faqs.question: Are Transitions good for kids?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Children's eyes are more sensitive to UV light, making the 100% UV protection and blue light filtering of Transitions lenses ideal for them.

faqs.question: What are the benefits?
faqs.answer: They provide 100% UV protection, filter harmful blue-violet light, reduce glare, and eliminate the need to constantly switch between prescription glasses and sunglasses.

faqs.question: Can I get them in my prescription?
faqs.answer: Yes, Transitions lenses are compatible with most frame styles and can be made in almost any prescription, including single vision and progressives.

seo.title: Solutions | Optika
seo.description: Exceptional optical solutions for partners and opticians.

hero.headline: EXCEPTIONAL OPTICAL SOLUTIONS
hero.description: Total support for partners and opticians across every touch-point.

intro.description: Optika equips clinics and independent stores with personalised lenses and an ordering flow designed to reduce remakes and improve patient outcomes.

cards.description: Everything connects seamlessly from prescription input to final delivery.
Digital validation catches problems before they become costly mistakes.
Your workflow moves faster without sacrificing precision or control.

tabs.label: SMOOTH OPTICS
tabs.characteristics:
Smooth Optics is the stand out innovation in the lens sector. The process for creating Smooth Optics designs starts by defining the lens surface in terms of its optical properties.

This PATENTED approach reverses the normal design process, so rather than create a surface and analyze to determine its optical performance, the starting point is describing the mean power required by the eye at all points of the lens and then deriving the surface to match this ideal.
tabs.functionality: This PATENTED approach reverses the normal design process, so rather than create a surface and analyze to determine its optical performance, the starting point is describing the mean power required by the eye at all points of the lens and then deriving the surface to match this ideal.
benefits: The best solution for everyday needs.
Ideal for sports and fashion wrap frames.

tabs.label: CUSTOM FORM
tabs.characteristics: CustomFORM is a cohesive approach to lens design, which considers a progressive lens as a single entity rather than an accumulation of individual points.
tabs.functionality: Custom Form technology analyses frame geometry and facial parameters to produce lenses with personalised curvature, delivering superior optics and minimised aberrations.
benefits: Compatible with a wide range of frame styles.

tabs.label: EYE VIEW
tabs.characteristics: Ophthalmic lenses have power errors when viewing away from the optical center of the lens. EyeView technology uses specially developed software which modifies the entire lens to correct power errors.
tabs.functionality: By combining biometric data with frame measurements, EyeView calculates the optimal optical design that maintains sharpness through the entire field of view.

tabs.label: EYE POWER
tabs.characteristics: EyePower provides an excellent visual experience, sharper vision and higher resolution thanks to the maximum individualization of the wearer's parameters.
tabs.functionality: Engineered for high-power prescriptions, EyePower technology reduces unwanted prismatic effects and delivers razor-sharp central vision even at extreme powers.

blocks.title: STREAMLINED WORKFLOWS
blocks.description: We provide partners with End to End Solutions and Custom Lenses that meet different and wide ranges of Use-Cases, Taste, and style.

blocks.title: SCALE WITHOUT LOSING CONSISTENCY
blocks.description: We operate as an integrated system for partners to creates a stable foundation for growth, operational clarity, and a more consistent experience across every touch-point.
